per_outcome.operationalization: Time in minutes from task start to completion, measured by the experimental platform.
Average of evaluator grades (1-7 scale) on overall quality, writing quality, content quality, and originality; three blinded evaluators per output.
Earnings per minute, combining quality-based bonus payments with time taken into a single composite metric.
Self-reported enjoyment of the task on a 1-10 Likert scale; measures affective response, not output speed or quality.
Self-reported feeling of skill/effectiveness on a 1-10 Likert scale; measures subjective competence perception, not output characteristics.
Self-reported worry about AI replacing workers in their occupation, 1-10 scale; measures attitudes toward technology, not task performance.
Self-reported optimism that AI will increase productivity in their occupation, 1-10 scale; measures beliefs about AI impact, not actual output.
Self-reported overall optimism/pessimism about AI advances, 1-10 scale; measures general AI attitudes, not task output.
Correlation coefficient between participant's average grades on first and second tasks; measures inequality persistence, not a single task outcome.
Percentage using ChatGPT at work in past week, from two-week follow-up survey; measures adoption behavior, not experimental task output.
